description: White House graphic in tall portrait format. The background is a darkened, blurred close-up photograph of what appears to be U.S. currency and possibly a document or license, in a muted gold-and-green tone. The headline at the top is split into two type treatments: 'Minnesota' in white bold sans-serif, stacked above 'FRAUD' in a large rough distressed stencil-style font. Below, two white sans-serif body paragraphs with key phrases highlighted in black boxes read: 'The Department of Labor is currently conducting a targeted review of Minnesota's Unemployment Insurance program.' and 'The Department of Agriculture has demanded Minnesota conduct recertification for its SNAP recipients to ensure the program complies with eligibility requirements - a commonsense move inexplicably challenged in court by state officials.' Centered at the bottom is the white line-art White House emblem with 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark.
notable_text: Minnesota FRAUD / The Department of Labor is currently conducting a targeted review of Minnesota's Unemployment Insurance program. / The Department of Agriculture has demanded Minnesota conduct recertification for its SNAP recipients...
